name: ParametricProfileItem
summary: The ParametricProfileItem class contains information from parametric profiles in the catalog. Parametric profile items can be enumerated using a profile item enumerator.

constructors.name: ParametricProfileItem
constructors.summary: Creates a new parametric profile item instance.

methods.name: AddCrossSection
methods.signature: public bool AddCrossSection(int CrossSectionNumber, double Location, int Type, int SubType)
methods.summary: Adds the cross section to a profile.

methods.name: CreateProfileString
methods.summary: Gets the parametric profile item prefix and adds parameter values.

returns.doc: The parametric profile string with parameter values in millimeters.

methods.name: DeleteCrossSection
methods.summary: Deletes the cross section of a profile.

methods.name: Export
methods.signature: public virtual bool Export(ref string filename)
methods.summary: Exports the profile item in the profile database to given file name. Currently library profiles, sketch profiles and clb profiles are supported. Library profiles are exported to *.lis format. Sketch profiles are exported to *.uel format. Clb profiles are exported to *.clb format. If path is not given profile is exported to model folder. If filename is empty profile name or prefix is used as filename.

params.name: filename
params.doc: The export file name of the profile item.

methods.name: GetCrossSection
methods.summary: Returns list of cross section points of inner surfaces from the profile item.

params.name: RelativeLocation
params.doc: The relative location of the cross section, values between 0 (start of profile) and 1 (end of profile).

returns.doc: List of inner cross section point lists on success, null on failure.

methods.name: GetHighAccuracyCrossSection
methods.summary: Get cross section with high accuracy.

params.name: RelativeLocation
params.doc: The relative location of the cross section, values between 0 (start of profile) and 1 (end of profile).

returns.doc: CrossSection object or null on failure.

methods.name: GetParametricProfilePrefix
methods.summary: Gets the parametric profile item prefix using the given subtype. This can be used after retrieving a library profile that has a parametric user-defined type.

methods.name: GetProfileItemSubTypes.
methods.summary: Selects the profile item and updates the sub types in the profile database.

methods.name: IsProfileUserDefined
methods.summary: Whether the profile is a fixed user-defined profile.

returns.doc: Whether the profile is a fixed user-defined profile or not.

methods.name: IsProfileUserParametric
methods.summary: Whether the profile is a parametric user-defined profile. If so, the prefix can be asked by type and subtype.

returns.doc: Whether the profile is a parametric user-defined profile or not.

methods.name: ModifyCrossSection
methods.signature: public bool ModifyCrossSection(int CrossSectionNumber, double Location, int Type, int SubType)
methods.summary: Modifies the cross section of a profile.

methods.name: ModifyProfileItemAnalysisParameter
methods.summary: Modify analysis parameter of library profile item. Modify is needed for profile item for updating changes to profile database

params.name: value
params.doc: The modified parameter value for the profile item.

methods.name: ModifyProfileItemParameter
methods.summary: Modify parameter of library profile item. Modify is needed for profile item for updating changes to profile database

params.name: value
params.doc: The modified parameter value for the profile item.

methods.name: ModifyProfileItemUserParameter
methods.summary: Modify user parameter of library profile item. Modify is needed for profile item for updating changes to profile database

methods.name: Select.
methods.summary: Selects the profile item in the profile database.

methods.name: Select(String)
methods.summary: Selects the parametric profile item in the profile database using the given name.

params.name: ProfileName
params.doc: The name of the profile to select.

methods.name: SelectByPrefix
methods.summary: Selects the parametric profile item in the profile database using the given prefix.

params.name: ProfilePrefix
params.doc: The prefix of the profile name to be select.

methods.name: SelectByProfileName
methods.summary: Selects the parametric profile item in the profile database using the given name.

params.name: ProfileName
params.doc: The profile name to be select

methods.name: SelectByTypeAndSubtype
methods.signature: public bool SelectByTypeAndSubtype(string profileName, ProfileItem.ProfileItemTypeEnum type, ProfileItem.ProfileItemSubTypeEnum subtype)
methods.summary: Selects the parametric profile item in the profile database using the given type and subtype.

methods.name: SelectCrossSections
methods.summary: Selects the profile item cross section in the profile database.

methods.name: SetEquivalentType
methods.signature: public bool SetEquivalentType(int CrossSectionNumber, int EquivalentType)
methods.summary: Sets the equivalent type for the specified cross section.

properties.name: aProfileItemCrossSections
properties.summary: An array list with the profile item cross-sections.

properties.name: aProfileItemParameters
properties.summary: An array list with the profile item parameters.

properties.name: IsCLBProfile
properties.summary: Whether the profile is a clb profile.

properties.name: IsHardcodedProfile
properties.summary: Whether the profile is a parametric user-defined hard coded profile.

properties.name: IsMultiCrossSectionUserParametric
properties.summary: Whether the profile is a parametric user-defined multi cross section profile.

properties.name: IsSketchedUserParametric
properties.summary: Whether the profile is a parametric user-defined sketched profile.

properties.name: NumberOfCrossSections
properties.summary: The number of cross sections in the profile item.

properties.name: ProfileItemCrossSections
properties.summary: The list of profile item cross-sections.
